word: H7981 - שְׁלֵט - shᵉlêṭ - shel-ate' - Have the mastery

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלט

Transliteration: shelêṭ

Phonetic: shel-ate'

BDB Definition:

  1. to have power, rule, domineer, rule over
    1. (Peal) have power upon or over, rule, fall upon, assault, be ruler
    2. (Aphel) make ruler

Origin: corresponding to H7980

TWOT entry: 3034

Part(s) of speech: Verb
